description: Matcher defines how to match on alert's labels.

matchType.description: matchType defines the match operation available with AlertManager >= v0.22.0. Takes precedence over Regex (deprecated) if non-empty. Valid values: "=" (equality), "!=" (inequality), "=~" (regex match), "!~" (regex non-match).

name.description: name defines the label to match. This specifies which alert label should be evaluated.

value.description: value defines the label value to match. This is the expected value for the specified label.
